task: Block 10/44 — Account Balances View. Adds accounting.fn_account_balances_as_of(p_company_id, p_as_of_date, p_from_date) — a STABLE SQL function that returns per-account cumulative (inception-to-date) balances, opening balance, period activity, and closing balance. Exposes GET /api/v1/accounting/account-balances with basis=accrual|cash support via applyCashBasisSuppression (decisions Q1, Q3, Q10). Building block for Block 13 (Balance Sheet) and Block 14 (Cash Flow). Backend-only — no new UI surface.
financial_rule: Read-only. No new write paths. Query derives exclusively from existing accounting.journal_entry_postings + accounting.journal_entries + accounting.posting_batches + catalogs.accounts. Honors existing voided-JE exclusion and batch_status filter identical to trial-balance.service.ts.
